mapper.sql: task_id, email, owner_type, category_id, title, content, memo, status, start_at, end_at, client_company, budget, paid_at, auto_registered, auto_registered_source
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task ( email, owner_type, category_id, title, content, memo, status, start_at, end_at, client_company, budget, paid_at, auto_registered, auto_registered_source ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{ownerType}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{memo}, #{status}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{clientCompany}, #{budget}, #{paidAt}, #{autoRegistered}, #{autoRegisteredSource} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE task
category_id = #{dto.categoryId},
title = #{dto.title},
content = #{dto.content},
memo = #{dto.memo},
status = #{dto.status},
start_at = #{dto.startAt},
end_at = #{dto.endAt},
client_company = #{dto.clientCompany},
budget = #{dto.budget},
paid_at = #{dto.paidAt},
auto_registered = #{dto.autoRegistered},
auto_registered_source = #{dto.autoRegisteredSource},
WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND email = #{email} AND owner_type = #{ownerType}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM task WHERE DATE(end_at) = DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{daysUntilDeadline} DAY) AND status != 'CANCELLED' ORDER BY end_at ASC, task_id ASC
